name: environment_mutual_aid_request_stonehaven_lib_eq
premise: A wildfire retardant drop is requested over a drinking-water intake; hydrologists disagree on dilution risk under current flow. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment mutual aid request stonehaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Kaito Chen
agents.identity: I am Kaito Chen, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Bennett
agents.identity: I am Fatima Bennett, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if liberty advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for equality.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Kaito Chen must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Kaito Chen do?
